pipeline_rule.description: MANDATORY per-task pipeline. A task is INCOMPLETE until ALL 4 stages pass sequentially. No stage can be skipped.

enforced_flow.on_fail: Return to Dev_Lead with CODE_REVIEW_FAIL issues
Return to Dev_Lead with QA_REPORT issues
Return to Dev_Lead with COMMIT_REJECTED reason

pipeline_rule.sprint_completion_rule: A sprint is COMPLETE only when ALL its sub-tasks reach COMMITTED status
pipeline_rule.violation_handling: If any agent attempts to skip a stage, Master_Orchestrator REJECTS the action and logs a PIPELINE_VIOLATION

multi_agent_orchestration.description: Stateful coordination of all 15 agents with persistence and checkpointing

tools.LangGraph: Leading framework for stateful multi-agent orchestration with built-in persistence, checkpointing, human-in-the-loop
tools.CrewAI: Alternative — role-based agent definition, delegation, sequential/parallel execution
tools.Temporal_io: Durable workflow orchestration with retry logic, saga patterns for long-running processes

multi_agent_orchestration.pattern: Supervisor pattern — delegates to specialists, collects results, resolves conflicts

state_management.description: Global project state tracking across all agents and sprints

tools.PostgreSQL_SQLModel: Persistent orchestration state (which agent doing what, sprint state, blockers)
tools.Redis_Valkey: Real-time shared state, message passing, pub/sub between agents
tools.LangGraph_Checkpointer: SQLite/PostgreSQL-backed state persistence for agent conversations

cross_stack_integration.description: Manage the async handshake protocol between backend and frontend

tools.openapi_diff: Detect contract changes that trigger handshake
tools.Spectral: Validate OpenAPI spec quality before approving contract changes

event_driven_coordination.description: Agent communication via events, not direct calls

tools.WebSocket_SSE: Real-time status updates to monitoring dashboard

event_driven_coordination.pattern: Event-driven architecture with circuit breaker for agent failures

conflict_resolution.description: Resolve conflicts when agents disagree or produce incompatible outputs

tools.LangGraph: Parallel node execution within agent graph
tools.asyncio: Python async for concurrent agent dispatch
